raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winna Galta laid tew
peederr/ ittin kà tahs Rustina-
schanas Kruhtis/ un ittin kà ta
labba Plezze/ laid ta tew peederr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiffus Pazelschanas-
Uppurns to swehto Leetu/ ko tee
Israëta Behrni tam KUNGam
peenefs/ efinu Es tew dewis/ un
taweem Dehleem / un tawahm
Meitahm ar tew/ par weenu Lik-
kunu muhscham. Schi laid irr
weena muhschiga/un ne isnihka-
ma Derriba preeksch to KUN-
Gii/ preeksch tew un tawu Dsun-
mumu ar tew.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS fazzija
us Aáronu: Tew ne buhs winno
Semimê Jhpaſchumu dabbuht /
un Dalliba tew ne buhs winno
Starpa buht/ Es efinu tawa
Dalta / un taws Jhpaſchums
starp teem Israëta Behrneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un redst / teem Lewja
Behrneem efinu es wiffus Def-
mitus eekſch Israëta par Jhpa-
schunu dewis/ winno Kalposcha-
nas labbad/ ar ko tee darbojahs
Sa-eefchanas Telts Darbòs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un teem Israëta Behr-
neem ne buhs wairs pee Sa-ee-
schanas Telts pee-eet / ka tee ne
apgrehkojahs un ne mirst.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet teem Lewiteembuhs
Sa-eefchanas Telts Darbòs
kalpoht/ un teem buhs sawus
Noseegumus nest / tas laid irr
weens Likkums muhscham pee
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tohs Israëta Behrnu
Defmitus/ ko tee tam KUN-
GAM par weenu Pazelschanas-
Uppuri uppure / efinu es teem
Lewiteem par Jhpaſchunu de-
wis/ tadeht efinu es us teem
fazzijis: Teem ne buhs starp I-
sraëta Behrneem nekahdu Jhpa-
schunu dabbuht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGSrunna-
ja us Mohsu/ fazzidams:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tew buhs arridsan us
teem Lewiteem runnaht / un us
teem faazziht: Kad juhs no teem
Israëta Behrneem tohs Definit-
tus dabbuseet / ko es jums par
Jhpaſchunu / no teem Israëta
Behrneem efinu dewis/ tad buhs
jums no teem weenu Pazelscha-
nas-Uppuri tam KUNGA M
pazelt/ to defmitu Teeſu no teem
Defmiteem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tastaps jums par juh-
fu Pazelschanas-Uppuri peelah-
gadihts/ tik labbi ta Labbiba no
ta Klohma/ ka ir ta Pilniba no
Wihna-Spaida.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta buhs jums arridsan
weenu Pazelschanas-Uppuri tam
KUNGAM uppureht / no wit-
feem juhfeem Definiteem/ ko juhs
no teem Israëta Behrneem dab-
bufeet/ un no teem ta KUNGA
Pazelschanas-Uppuri doht Aáro-
nam tam Preesteram.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "No wiffahin juhsahm Dah-
wanahin
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
